question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Find the race of the superhero who weighs 108kg and is 188cm tall. weighs 108kg refers to weight_kg = 108; 188cm tall refers to height_cm = 188;

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many female superheroes are in Marvel Comics?  female refers to gender = 'Female'; Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';
orig_masked: How many [V2] [T9] are in [V1]?  [V2] refers to [C7] = '[V2]'; [V1] refers to [C15] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C15]; [V2] is a value of the column [C7]
orig_evidence: female refers to gender = 'Female'; Marvel Comics refers to publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T3.gender = 'Female'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Find the average number of long-shot done by Ahmed Samir Farag. average number of long shot = DIVIDE(SUM(long_shots), COUNT(player_fifa_api_id));
orig_masked: Find the average number of [C151] done by [V1]. average number of [C151] = DIVIDE(SUM([C151]), COUNT([C155]));; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]

orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.long_shots) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.`date`) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Ahmed Samir Farag'

question: <QUESTION>

orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id GROUP BY T1.A16 ORDER BY T1.A16 DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How many accounts in North Bohemia has made a transaction with the partner's bank being AB? A3 contains the region names; North Bohemia is a region.
orig_masked: How many [T1] in [V1] has made a [T8] with the [C50] being [V2]? [C25] contains the [C25]; [V1] is a [T5].; [V1] is a value of the column [C25]; [V2] is a value of the column [C50]
orig_evidence: A3 contains the region names; North Bohemia is a region.
orig_gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.bank = 'AB' AND T1.A3 = 'north Bohemia'
